<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get all referrals"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/programs/{program_id}/promoters/{promoter_id}/referrals"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieves a  list of all referrals.
